rules.pattern: Input field with no data-test or ID on legacy sites
rules.solution: Use structural sibling selector: page.locator('p:has-text("Label Text") + input')
rules.rationale: Legacy sites (LambdaTest, older enterprise apps) often lack test IDs. The label-to-input DOM structure is more stable than element IDs which can be auto-generated.
antiPatterns: Do not use #result-id or #confirm-msg — these are brittle auto-generated IDs

rules.pattern: Elements disappear or detach during interaction on dynamic pages
rules.solution: Add 100ms layout delay before clicking: await this.page.waitForTimeout(100); await locator.click();
rules.rationale: Pages with aggressive re-rendering (LambdaTest Simple Form Demo) can detach elements between resolution and click. A short delay allows the layout to settle.
antiPatterns: Do not use waitForLoadState("networkidle") — modern SPAs keep persistent connections

rules.pattern: Handling shadow DOM elements on Google Login
rules.solution: Use page.locator('shadow=some-selector') or specific Piercing selectors to access elements inside shadow roots.
